python_pl.docx.markdown_preview:
Acme Cloud Platform P&L FY2026

Scenario: Board-ready operating plan with revenue, COGS, opex, EBITDA, risks, and sales/PM actions.

# Executive summary

- Revenue grows from $12.0M to $17.7M on enterprise expansion and partner attach.

- Gross margin improves from 68.0% to 73.0% after support automation and hosting optimization.

- EBITDA turns from -$1.4M in Q1 to $2.0M in Q4 while preserving PM discovery capacity.

# Quarterly P&L

# Commentary

Sales should prioritize expansion SKUs with payback under 12 months; PM should protect roadmap items that lift attach and reduce support load.

# Risk register

| G&A | -1300000 | -1350000 | -1400000 | -1420000 | -5470000 |
| EBITDA | -1440000 | -114000 | 865000 | 1951000 | 1262000 |

Executive summary: revenue expands, gross margin improves, EBITDA turns positive by Q4.

summary.llm_tooling_implication: Go can open and traverse DOCX/XLSX, but the agent must supply custom code for every extraction, summary, edit, and formatting operation; no MCP/JSON/Markdown tool contract is available out of the box.
